name: imagegen
description: Generate and edit images with a gpt-image-2 Azure OpenAI (Foundry) deployment.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and edit images with Azure OpenAI
interface.longDescription: Generate and edit images with a gpt-image-2 deployment on Azure OpenAI, with optional local file output.
defaultPrompt: Generate a square image of a red fox.
Edit an image to add a snowy background.
